feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM
entry.content:
is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM 

My customer needs to have a reports for all purchased spare parts and services for an equipment 

Without the need to display P.M order to know the equipment

entry.title: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in SAP maintained table
entry.content:
Do SAP consider changes made in T Code: BS22 as custom modifications or SAP allows customers to make changes in this SAP Maintained table and consider it as Standard configuration?

I0045 TECO Technically completed

Standard setup provided for TECO is that a TECO'ed Production Order cannot be used in a Purchase Order.

But Business want to use a TECO Production Order in a Purchase Order, and to achieve this we should change the standard setting from "Forbidden" to "Allowed" in BS22.

I want to know whether this is allowed by SAP or do SAP consider this as custom modification and will stop supporting in this area after we make this change.

entry.title: Auto Release of Orders In Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we auto release maintenance orders in fiori when the order is saved?

entry.title: Unable to delete the released work order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we try to delete the released work orders through the below programs we are unable to delete them:

Preparation program - Set deletion flag / deletion indicator

RIARCORV / RIARCORVS

The WRITE program - Generate the archive file

RIARCORA / RIARCORAS

The DELETION program - Remove the order records from main database tables

RIARCORD / RIARCORDS 

Can you please help me on this.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Mandatory fields in Fiori condition based
entry.content:
Hi Community,

we did a customizing to make the Fields Defect Type VIQMFE.FEGRP and Short Text Damage Code RIWO00.TXTCDFE mandatory for a specific Notificationtype.

In ERP everything is working well, also when a Repair Order inclusive notification is technically completed the System complains about the missing values.

But how can we get it work in Fiori App F2023 that the Defect Type and Short Text Damage Code are treated there also mandatory for a specific Notification Type.

Kind Regards

Marcus

entry.title: PM notification and order
entry.content:
Hello, I have an issue related to PM. When I fill in a field on the IW21 screen, how can I ensure that this data automatically appears when I convert it to a work order in IW32? For example, if I enter something in the Items or Tasks (in IW21), I want these fields to automatically show up in the IW32 screen when the order is converted. Is there a standard solution or a way to achieve this using BADI or something? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: PM Order operation list
entry.content:
Hello.
I have an issue about PM order operation list.
The user wants to add the operations in the notification from a catalog.
These operations from the catalog have to integrate to the order's operation.
Our first solution is using the "Tasks" in the notification. We wanted to use the "Tasks" with its catalog, then we tried to find the order operation list's changing function.
So, we try to find the alternative solution for the requirement.

Looking forward your solutions.
Thanks a lot.

entry.title: EAM 9-phase maintenance process - configuration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to configure the 9-phase maintenance process as described in the sap best practices, but can't really activate the full best-practice content on our system (we partially already use the document types, etc.). I've gotten to a point where the overall status profiles mentioned in various documentations PMSP1 and PMSP2 are needed to proceed, but can't find a single source which would list the full settings behind those status profiles as well as the sub-phases.

Could someone please provide the standard settings for those objects in a simple table form or direct me to a resource where they might already be available?

Thank you in advance!
Best regards,
Janusz Gren

entry.title: Enhancement in IW42
entry.content:
Hi,
We have some enhancements done in T Code: IW42- Overall Order Confirmation in ECC for some field validations and while we are moving to SAP S/4 HANA 2023 and we plan to activate the SAP GUI App for IW42 which is available in Fiori Apps Library. I like to know whether all the enhancements which we have currently done in IW42 in ECC will reflect in the SAP GUI App for IW42?

Do we need any further adjustments to ensure all enhancements in IW42 ECC is available in this app as well in S/4 HANA 2023?

 

SAP

entry.title: since SAP Update it´s not possible to export data as a text file with tcode IW37n
entry.content: since SAP Update it´s not possible to export data as a text file with tcode IW37Nbefore SAP updateafter SAP update

entry.title: Multiple Equipment in one Work Order for Planned Maintenance
entry.content:
Limit the number of Work Orders for Planned Maintenance, while still covering detailed proof of inspection, precise document assignment and cost allocation.

 

Context

Conflicting objectives: Settlement rules according to SAP standard vs. efficient work order processing
SAP standard: one maintenance plan for many equipment has correspondingly many maintenance items; each maintenance item generates a work order with one equipment as reference object; apart from that, all these many work orders have the same content; the settlement rule of each work order is created with the account assignment of the reference object - this is not satisfactory

Alternative that could be programmed: Put all equipment on the object list of one maintenance item; generate thus only one work order with an invalid reference object but all equipment on the object list; generate the settlement rule distributed equally across the account assignment of each equipment on the object list.

Could anyone suggest a Standard process for this request? Thanks!

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order

entry.title: Standard Text Key in Fiori apps for maintenance orders
entry.content:
Dear,

A particular customer wishes to use the standard text field (AFVGD-KTSCH) in the operations overview for maintenance orders and task lists :

This field is still available when using the SAP GUI in S/4HANA ( as you can see in printscreen above),however in the Fiori applications for both Public and Private Cloud S/4HANA this field is no longer displayed in apps such as: " Change Maintenance Order", " Manage Maintenance Notifications & Orders", " Create Task list" etc.
We have also checked the settings button in the operation overview and the field is nowhere to be found:

Has this field been removed in Fiori or can it be added through development or configuration?

Thank you

entry.title: Basic Start Date of Preventive Maintenance Order keeps getting scheduled to future date
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I hope someone may help me understand what happens. Currently, there are some Preventive Maintenance Orders that are being scheduled in future dates every day whenever RISTRA20 is run. We do not have any other programs being run that schedules Maintenance Orders. 

For example, the Order below has been scheduled numerous times already and have been scheduled far in the future. This does not happen to all the Orders. What might be causing this? Thank you 

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Completion Indicator CHECKED generates WOs even without previous WOs completed
entry.content:
Hi All.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? We have 31 exactly same maintenance plans. They are scheduled and have already generated some calls. All of a sudden, plan number 27 and 28 have started work orders without the previous orders being completed. The following are the details of the MPs:

- Cycle/Unit = 5 days

- Offset = 0 day

- Shift Factor for Late Completion = 100%, Tolerance (+) = 0%

- Shift Factor for Early Completion = 100%, Tolerance (-) = 0%

- Cycle Modification Factor = 1.00

- Call Horizon = 5 days

- Scheduling Period = 365 days

- Completion Requirement = CHECKED

- Scheduling Indicator = Time

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan with Completion Indicator CHECKED ge...
entry.content:
Hi @indraniljoshi1989,

Notice that you've activated enhancing call horizon functionality (switch -  EAM_SFWS_MPLAN_OPEN_HORIZ_DAYS) which allows you to set call horizon in days. This may be the cause for some plans bypassing the completion requirement check. 

Check this SAP note and implement the corrections - 1849123 - EAMCC: Enhancing the call horizon- check for call completion - SAP for Me

Regards,
Ritesh PR

entry.title: BAPI to change work center in mass
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I need to develop a program for mass change of work center & their capacity . Can any one please let me know any BAPI / FM available for it ?

Thanking you 

Mohammed

entry.title: Inspections characteristics are not supported for Equipment, General Maintenance & FL objects
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I recently observed that Insp. characteristics structure or feature is not supported in the S/4HANA Migration Cockpit On-Premise 2022 FPS02. 

Could you please let me know the reason for not providing this structure in the underlying API's for the mentioned PM Migration objects.

Also, I request you to suggest either a alternative method to upload this structure data into the SAP or share the FMs/BAPIs that will help to create/change the task list data.

Looking forward to hear more information from your side.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

Thanks,

Vishwa

entry.title: Resource scheduling custom report
entry.content:
Hi 
Business wants to have custom report for resource scheduling like processing status, attainment percentage, schedule status, etc.

Please let me know any Table or BAPI for same to create custom report.

entry.title: Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planner App
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let us know regarding Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planner App and in detail about all the integrations that needs to be done for this app.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: BAPI to change maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Tried to use BDC, LSMW to change task list en masse but was not successful . Can any one please suggest any BAPI or other available features on S4 hana cloud to change task list ( equipment task list, general task list ) in mass  .  

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed
